languages.original_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

languages.text: "Нунциус выражает скорбь. Я разделяю его эмоции, но раз Омниссия определил мне этот путь, то так тому и быть".
"Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус выражает скорбь. Я разделяю его эмоции, но раз Омниссия определил мне этот путь, то так тому и быть".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."
"Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."
"Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスは悲しみに暮れている。彼の気持ちはわかるが、オムニシアが選んだ道だから、従うしかない」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

languages.text: "Nuncius drückt sein Bedauern aus. Ich teile seine Ansicht, aber da der Omnissiah diesen Pfad für mich bestimmt hat, möge es so sein."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius drückt sein Bedauern aus. Ich teile seine Ansicht, aber da der Omnissiah diesen Pfad für mich bestimmt hat, möge es so sein."

languages.text: «Nuncius lamenta su decisión. Yo comparto sus sentimientos, pero si este es el camino que nos ha deparado el Omnissiah, que así sea».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius lamenta su decisión. Yo comparto sus sentimientos, pero si este es el camino que nos ha deparado el Omnissiah, que así sea».

languages.text: "Nuncius, üzüntüsünü ifade ediyor. Ben de onun duygularını paylaşıyorum ama madem Hermesih benim için bu yolu belirledi, öyle olsun."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, üzüntüsünü ifade ediyor. Ben de onun duygularını paylaşıyorum ama madem Hermesih benim için bu yolu belirledi, öyle olsun."

languages.text: « Nuncius exprime sa profonde tristesse, sentiment que je partage. Mais puisque l'Omnimessie me conduit sur une autre voie, qu'il en soit ainsi. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius exprime sa profonde tristesse, sentiment que je partage. Mais puisque l'Omnimessie me conduit sur une autre voie, qu'il en soit ainsi. »

languages.text: “努恩修斯表达了遗憾。我亦有同感，但既然欧姆尼赛亚已为我择定此路，那便顺其自然吧。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius expresses his sorrow. I share his sentiments, but since the Omnissiah has determined this path for me, so be it."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯表达了遗憾。我亦有同感，但既然欧姆尼赛亚已为我择定此路，那便顺其自然吧。”
